manifest.description: The official addon for movie and series catalogs
manifest.name: Cinemeta
Local Files (without catalog support)
manifest.description: Local add-on to find playable files: .torrent, .mp4, .mkv and .avi

manifest.name: AIOStreams
manifest.description: AIOStreams consolidates multiple Stremio addons and debrid services into a single, easily configurable addon. It allows highly customisable filtering, sorting, and formatting of results and supports proxying all your streams through MediaFlow Proxy or StremThru for improved compatibility and IP restriction bypassing.

manifest.name: AIOMetadata
manifest.description: A metadata addon for power users. AIOMetadata uses TMDB, TVDB, TVMaze, MyAnimeList, IMDB and Fanart.tv to provide accurate data for movies, series, and anime. You choose the source.
